notes: Baseline: download-template format. Auto-detects NATIVE and maps with zero clicks.

tool: Collibra Data Intelligence Cloud (Business Glossary — asset CSV/XLSX export & import)
notes: Excel export with reimport identifier columns; URL = host/asset/{ID}. No URI column (synthesize).

tool: Alation Data Catalog — Business Glossary term export/import (Bulk Utility "use_this_for_upload" spreadsheet; underlying data-dictionary CSV/TSV)
notes: Bulk Utility TSV; title/description/id; no URI column (synthesize from id).

tool: Microsoft Purview Data Catalog (classic) — Business Glossary term import/export
notes: CSV UTF-8 (BOM). No id and no URL column -> nothing to synthesize a URI from (GAP).

tool: Informatica Cloud Data Governance & Catalog (CDGC) — Business Glossary bulk Import/Export template (Data Governance and Catalog → New → Import Assets → Download Import Template, and the matching bulk Export). Legacy on-prem Informatica Analyst-tool Business Glossary (historically paired with Axon) export noted as an alternative.
notes: Multi-sheet; data sheet first. "Core:"/"Business:" prefixed headers defeat alias matching (GAP).

tool: IBM Knowledge Catalog (Cloud Pak for Data) / Watson Knowledge Catalog — business glossary term CSV import/export (governance artifact CSV format). Legacy variant: InfoSphere Information Governance Catalog (IGC) sectioned glossary CSV.
notes: CSV; Artifact ID is a GUID; id column header "Artifact ID" not auto-mapped to id field.

tool: erwin Data Intelligence (Quest) — Business Glossary Manager (Business Terms import/export)
notes: Both Definition AND Description present (ambiguous definition); no id/URL (synthesize gap).

tool: Atlan — Asset Export (basic) with "Glossaries only" scope produces a Glossary CSV (glossaries, categories, terms; one object per row) in the SAME schema the Asset Import for glossaries app consumes, so it round-trips. Headers are backend Atlas attribute names (typeName, name, qualifiedName, anchor, userDescription, certificateStatus, ownerUsers, atlanTags, categories, term-relationship columns, ...). A separate, simpler in-glossary "Bulk Upload" path downloads a dynamic per-glossary {glossary_name}.xlsx with human-friendly headers (Name, Type, Categories, Description, Business name, User owners, Group owners, Certification, Certification message, Tags) and uses DIFFERENT conventions (comma multi-value separator, title-case certification).
notes: userDescription not mapped to definition; qualifiedName is the natural id; links holds JSON.
Leading Overview sheet -> default sheet pick is WRONG (GAP). Resource (IRI) is a real URL but often blank.

tool: SAP Information Steward — Metapedia "Import and export with Excel" (Business Terms worksheet). Alternative: SAP Datasphere catalog glossary term import (Excel, attributes mapped at import).
notes: Leading Version sheet -> default sheet pick is WRONG (GAP). Technical Name is the unique id.

tool: Google Cloud Dataplex Universal Catalog (now "Knowledge Catalog") — Business Glossary
notes: term_display_name not auto-mapped to business term (GAP); no id/URL.
